name: reply-pulse-mvp
description: Root package to manage full-stack development

scripts.predev: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path frontend/.next/dev/lock) { Remove-Item frontend/.next/dev/lock -Force }"
